## Week in Review: 2026-03-23 to 2026-03-29

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 14.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.4 (-46.9% WoW), sentiment: negative (-0.14)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.0 (-39.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.6 (-47.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.18)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 14.3 (-58.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.11)
